title: jasminum pubescens
intro: Jasminum pubescens, also known as the Himalayan jasmine or climbing jasmine, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Himalayas and parts of China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Jasminum pubescens include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Jasminum pubescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make various remedies, including capsules and tinctures.
